headlines.title: Judge halts Trump ‘anti-weaponization’ fund after Jan. 6 prosecutor sues
headlines.description: Judge halts Trump ‘anti-weaponization’ fund after Jan. 6 prosecutor files suit

headlines.title: US and Iranian Negotiators Close in on Preliminary Peace Deal
headlines.description: After several days of renewed strikes on both sides, the United States and Iran are closing in on a preliminary agreement that extends the ceasefire for 60 days, begins negotiations on Iran’s nuclear program and opens the Strait of Hormuz. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Louisiana passes new congressional map, dismantling one majority-Black district
headlines.description: Louisiana Republicans approved a new congressional map Friday, eliminating one of the state’s two majority-Black districts and drawing an additional Republican-leaning district in its place

headlines.title: Rep. Frederica Wilson, an 83-year-old Florida Democrat, won’t seek re-election
headlines.description: Rep. Frederica Wilson, D-Fla., a former teacher and principal known in Congress for her colorful outfits and matching hats, said she will not seek re-election this fall.

headlines.title: ICE agent charged in Minneapolis shooting is arrested in Texas
headlines.description: Christian Castro was taken into custody on charges of assault and falsely reporting a crime in connection with the Jan. shooting in Minneapolis of Julio Sosa-Celis during an attempted immigration arrest.

headlines.title: Pam Bondi tells lawmakers ‘redaction errors’ were made in Epstein files release
headlines.description: Former Attorney General Pam Bondi told lawmakers on the House Oversight Committee on Friday that the Justice Department made “redaction errors” in its release of records related to Jeffrey Epstein, according to a copy of her opening statement obtained by NBC News

headlines.title: Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket explodes during engine-firing test in Florida
headlines.description: Jeff Bezos’ Blue Origin New Glenn rocket exploded during an engine-firing test in Florida, which shook nearby homes in Cape Canaveral and Cocoa Beach. In a brief statement, Blue Origin said it "experienced an anomaly" during the test and “will provide updates” as more is learned.

headlines.title: Vomiting virus is spreading across most of the U.S.
headlines.description: Flu season may be mostly behind us, but levels of norovirus, the nasty, highly contagious stomach bug, are rising, according to wastewater data.

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: Ex-head of Des Moines schools sentenced to 2 years in prison for misrepresenting U.S. citizenship
headlines.description: The former superintendent of Iowa’s largest school district was sentenced Friday to two years in federal prison for falsely claiming to be a U.S. citizen.“I regret what I’ve done every single day,” Ian Roberts said before U.S.

headlines.description: Christian Castro was taken into custody on charges of assault and falsely reporting a crime in connection with the Jan. shooting in Minneapolis of Julio Sosa-Celis during an attempted immigration arrest.
